original_file: Let AI take the notes next meeting
email_subject: Let AI take the notes next meeting
email_body:
Stay in the moment. Get a clean summary after.  



Visual of AI Meeting Notes ( https://www.notion.so/?target=create_meeting_note&utm_campaign=%5BJW%5D%5Bv2%5D+AI+Meeting+Notes+-+New+use+case+discovery&utm_campaignid=837&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1+-+Getting+started&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Hi Ali,



Taking notes while running the meeting is a lot. You shouldn't have to split your attention.



Meet AI

Meeting Notes. You talk. It captures the details and delivers an instant summary in Notion you can share and act on.



Try AI Meeting Notes now ( https://www.notion.so/?target=create_meeting_note&utm_campaign=%5BJW%5D%5Bv2%5D+AI+Meeting+Notes+-+New+use+case+discovery&utm_campaignid=837&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1+-+Getting+started&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



In your next meeting, type /meet on a Notion page to give it a spin.



Thanks,



The Notion Team



PS: Watch this quick demo ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f4ZYEZO3Sq0&utm_campaign=%5BJW%5D%5Bv2%5D+AI+Meeting+Notes+-+New+use+case+discovery&utm_campaignid=837&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1+-+Getting+started&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) to see it in action.



Write, plan, organize.

In one AI-powered workspace.
